# tfc_workspace

*This page will be auto-generated by stardoc.*

Create Terraform Cloud / Enterprise runner targets wired to a workspace.

```starlark
load("@rules_tf2//tf2:def.bzl", "tfc_workspace")

tfc_workspace(
    name = "prod",
    module = ":my_module",
    workspace_name = "my-workspace-prod",
    organization = "my-org",
)
```

See [Cloud Integration Overview](README.md) for more information.
